subcodes.first_line: O Letter of Fidelity! Thy letter hath come into Our presence, and We have understood that which thou didst inscribe therein, and We have accepted thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف الوفا قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و عرفت ما سطر فیه من لدنک و قبلنا حبک
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels
